title: hedyotis polyphylla
intro: Hedyotis polyphylla, also known as Ru Bao or Oldenlandia diffusa, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The medicinal properties of Hedyotis polyphylla include reducing fever, relieving cough and bronchitis, and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Hedyotis polyphylla include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, such as respiratory and cardiovascular issues.
